# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Node.js runtime as parent image
FROM node:14-alpine

# Set working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json to WORKDIR
COPY package*.json ./

# Install application dependencies
RUN npm install

# Bundle app source inside Docker image
COPY . .

EXPOSE 80 5432 6379 8080

CMD [ "node", "server.js" ]
